changeSet.author: dmitry

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT count(1) FROM information_schema.constraint_column_usage WHERE table_name = 'taro_layouts' AND constraint_name = 'taro_layouts_layout_type_check'

changeSet.comment: Удаление ограничения check constraint для layout_type через preConditions
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE taro_layouts DROP CONSTRAINT taro_layouts_layout_type_check;
